_description: Golden file with channels only, no system_info section
_parser_yaml:
downstream:
  format: table
  resource: /status.html
  tables:
    - selector:
        type: nth
        match: 0
      row_start: 1
      columns:
        - index: 0
          field: channel_id
          type: integer
        - index: 1
          field: frequency
          type: frequency
      channel_type:
        fixed: qam
